answers.value: Mixed media mosaic using broken vintage china from my grandmother Helen’s dinner set (circa 1950s), reclaimed barn wood backing from a deconstructed corn crib in Lemont, discarded glass beads from a thrift store necklace, and salvaged copper wire from an old table lamp found at the Lemont Goodwill.

answers.value: Wall-hanging collage constructed from saved grocery and hardware store receipts (2017–2024) from Lemont and surrounding suburbs, sewn together with leftover quilting thread, mounted on a backing of flattened cardboard shipping boxes, and finished with a frame made from reclaimed pallet wood from a local garden center.
